backupShareSubject.desc: Subject line for the OS share sheet when exporting an unencrypted (plain JSON) backup file.

backupShareSubjectEncrypted.desc: Subject line for the OS share sheet when exporting an encrypted (.jfwbk) backup file.

backupProtectTitle.desc: Title of the dialog shown before exporting, asking whether to passphrase-protect the backup.

backupEnterPassphraseTitle.desc: Title of the dialog shown when restoring an encrypted backup, prompting for the passphrase.

backupProtectDesc.en: Set a passphrase to encrypt the backup file. Without it, anyone with the file can read your journal.
backupProtectDesc.desc: Body text of the export passphrase dialog explaining why encryption is recommended.

backupEnterPassphraseDesc.en: This file is encrypted. Type the passphrase you used when exporting.
backupEnterPassphraseDesc.desc: Body text of the restore passphrase dialog, prompting for the passphrase used at export time.

backupPassphraseLabel.desc: Text field label for the backup passphrase input.

backupConfirmPassphraseLabel.desc: Text field label for the confirm-passphrase input shown only when exporting.

backupSkipPlainJson.desc: Button that skips encryption and exports an unencrypted plain JSON backup.

backupPassphraseEmptyError.desc: Validation error shown when the passphrase field is left blank.

backupPassphraseMismatchError.desc: Validation error shown when the passphrase and confirm-passphrase fields differ.

backupPassphraseTooShortError.en: Use at least 8 characters — longer is safer.
backupPassphraseTooShortError.desc: Validation error shown when the export passphrase is shorter than 8 characters.

backupEncryptButton.desc: Confirm button in the export passphrase dialog that encrypts the backup.

backupUnlockButton.desc: Confirm button in the restore passphrase dialog that decrypts the backup.
